entities.name: BACKGROUND SEGMENTATION
entities.description: The process of separating the plant from its background in 3D scans to ensure reliable trait assessment.

entities.name: 3D PLANT PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The use of 3D imaging and analysis to measure plant traits.

entities.name: TRAIT ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of evaluating specific characteristics of a plant.

entities.name: COORDINATE-BASED SEGMENTATION
entities.description: A traditional background segmentation method that often leads to data loss.

entities.name: AI-DRIVEN APPROACH
entities.description: A new segmentation method using a Multi-Layer Perceptron model to enhance precision.

entities.name: MULTI-LAYER PERCEPTRON
entities.description: The specific AI model architecture used for background segmentation.

entities.name: RGB DATA
entities.description: Red, Green, and Blue color information used as input for the AI model.

entities.name: SPATIAL XYZ DATA
entities.description: Three-dimensional coordinate data used as input for the AI model.

entities.name: NEAR-INFRARED NIR DATA
entities.description: Near-infrared spectral data used as input for the AI model.

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT PHENOTYPING
entities.description: Rapid and automated measurement of plant traits on a large scale.

entities.name: EARLY GROWTH STAGES
entities.description: The initial phases of plant development where segmentation is often challenging.

entities.name: PROSTRATE SPECIES
entities.description: Plant species with a low-growing, spreading habit that are difficult to segment.

entities.name: LEAF AREA ESTIMATION
entities.description: The measurement of the total surface area of a plant's leaves.

entities.name: DESTRUCTIVE MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Physical measurements that require destroying the plant sample, used for validation.

entities.name: PRECISION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An agricultural management concept based on observing, measuring, and responding to inter and intra-field variability in crops.

entities.name: PLANT SCIENCE
entities.description: The study of the structure, function, and genetics of plants.
